info.title: 0x Cross-Chain API
info.description: This is the official API reference for the 0x Cross-Chain API (v1).

get.description: Get the quotes for a cross chain swap

parameters.description: Visit dashboard.0x.org to get your API Key
parameters.name: 0x-api-key
originChain
parameters.description: The source chain from which the cross-chain swap will originate. Can be specified as chain ID or name. See [here](https://0x-docs.gitbook.io/0x-cross-chain-api-beta/developer-resources/supported-chains-and-providers) for the list of supported chains

parameters.name: destinationChain
parameters.description: The destination chain where tokens will be received after the cross-chain swap. Can be specified as chain ID or name. See [here](https://0x-docs.gitbook.io/0x-cross-chain-api-beta/developer-resources/supported-chains-and-providers) for the list of supported chains

parameters.name: sellToken
parameters.description: The contract address of the token to sell on the origin chain. Format varies by chain type (EVM address for EVM/HyperCore chains, token mint address for Solana, base58check address for Tron)

parameters.name: buyToken
parameters.description: The contract address of the token to buy on the destination chain. Format varies by chain type (EVM address for EVM/HyperCore chains, token mint address for Solana, base58check address for Tron)

parameters.name: sellAmount
parameters.description: The amount of `sellToken` (in `sellToken`'s base units) to sell on the origin chain

parameters.name: originAddress
parameters.description: The wallet address on the origin chain that holds the sellToken balance and will initiate the cross-chain transaction

parameters.name: destinationAddress
parameters.description: The wallet address on the destination chain that will receive the buyToken. If not specified, defaults to originAddress on the destination chain

parameters.name: gasPayer
parameters.description: The Solana address that will pay for transaction fees when the origin chain is Solana. Only applicable for Solana origin chains

parameters.name: slippageBps
parameters.description: The maximum acceptable slippage for each swap or bridge step of the cross-chain swap in basis points (100 = 1%)

parameters.name: excludedBridges
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of bridge providers to exclude from routing

parameters.name: includedBridges
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of bridge providers to include in routing. Mutually exclusive with excludedBridges

parameters.name: excludedSwapSources
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of DEX sources to exclude from routing on both chains

parameters.name: feeBps
parameters.description: The trading fee amounts in basis points to charge on the origin chain (supports single or comma-separated values). Must be used together with feeRecipient. When multiple values are provided, must match the length of feeRecipient. Note: integrator fee collection is not yet supported for Tron-originated routes.

parameters.name: feeRecipient
parameters.description: The wallet addresses to receive trading fees on the origin chain (supports single or comma-separated values). Must be used together with feeBps. When multiple values are provided, must match the length of feeBps. Note: integrator fee collection is not yet supported for Tron-originated routes.

parameters.name: feeToken
parameters.description: The token addresses for fee collection on the origin chain (supports single or comma-separated values). Must be the same as sellToken. When multiple values are provided, must match the length of feeBps. If omitted, defaults to sellToken. Note: integrator fee collection is not yet supported for Tron-originated routes.

parameters.name: sortQuotesBy
parameters.description: How to sort the returned quotes - either by speed (fastest execution time) or price (best exchange rate)

parameters.name: maxNumQuotes
parameters.description: The maximum number of cross-chain quotes to return, between 1 and 10. Each quote represents a different combination of bridges and DEXs

liquidityAvailable.description: Whether sufficient liquidity exists across bridges and DEXs to execute the cross-chain swap

allowanceTarget.description: The contract address to set the allowance on, if necessary

originChainId.description: The numeric chain ID of the origin chain where the swap begins

originChain.description: The name of the origin chain where the swap begins

destinationChainId.description: The numeric chain ID of the destination chain where tokens will be received

destinationChain.description: The name of the destination chain where tokens will be received

sellToken.description: The contract address of the token being sold on the origin chain

buyToken.description: The contract address of the token being bought on the destination chain

spender.description: The address to set the allowance on

allowance.description: The allowances that the `originAddress` must set in order to execute the swap successfully. Null if no allowance is required

actual.description: The current balance of the `sellToken` in the `originAddress` address

expected.description: The balance of `sellToken` required for the swap to execute successfully

balance.description: The balance of `sellToken` that the `originAddress` must hold. Null if the `originAddress` has sufficient balance

simulationIncomplete.description: This is set to `true` when 0x cannot validate the transaction. This happens when the `originAddress` has an insufficient balance of `sellToken` and 0x is unable to perform enhanced quote validation with such low balance. Note that this does not necessarily mean that the trade will revert

invalidSwapSourcesPassed.description: List of invalid swap sources specified in the `excludedSwapSources` parameter

invalidBridgesPassed.description: List of invalid bridge providers specified in the `excludedBridges` or `includedBridges` parameter

zid.description: The unique ZeroEx identifier of the request

sellAmount.description: The amount of sellToken (in sellToken base units) required on the origin chain

buyAmount.description: The estimated amount of `buyToken` (in `buyToken`'s base units) to be received on the destination chain

minBuyAmount.description: The minimum amount of buyToken guaranteed across the entire cross-chain quote. This price is influenced by the `slippageBps` parameter

amount.description: The amount of the integrator fee in token's base units

token.description: The contract address of the token in which the integrator collected a fee

type.description: The fee type indicating it is calculated as a percentage of trade volume

chainId.description: The chain ID where this fee will be collected

integratorFee.description: The details about the first fee collected by the integrator

amount.description: The amount of the integrator fee in token's base units

token.description: The contract address of the token in which the integrator collected a fee

type.description: The fee type indicating it is calculated as a percentage of trade volume

chainId.description: The chain ID where this fee will be collected

integratorFees.description: The details about the fees collected by the integrator

amount.description: The 0x fee in token's base units

token.description: The contract address of the token in which 0x collected a fee

type.description: The fee type indicating it is calculated as a percentage of trade volume

zeroExFee.description: The details about the fee collected by 0x

amount.description: The bridge fee amount in token's base units that will be added to the transaction value

token.description: The contract address of the token in which the bridge fee is collected

type.description: The fee type indicating it is a native bridge fee

bridgeNativeFee.description: Native fee required by the bridge provider for cross-chain message passing that will be added to the transaction value

amount.description: The reimbursement fee amount in token's base units

token.description: The contract address of the token in which the reimbursement fee is collected

recipient.description: The wallet address that receives the reimbursement fee

fees.description: All fees associated with this cross-chain quote, including integrator fees, 0x protocol fees, and bridge native fees

chainType.description: The blockchain type for Ethereum-compatible chains

gasPrice.description: The gas price in wei used for cost estimation

gasLimit.description: The estimated gas limit required for successful execution

totalNetworkFee.description: The estimated total network cost of the swap. On chains where there is no L1 data cost, it is calculated as `gas` * `gasPrice`. On chains where there is an L1 data cost, it is calculated as `gas` * `gasPrice + L1 data`

chainType.description: The blockchain type for Solana Virtual Machine

base.description: The base transaction fee in lamports for Solana

priority.description: The priority fee in lamports for faster transaction processing

total.description: The total fee in lamports (base + priority)

chainType.description: The blockchain type for Tron Virtual Machine

energyFee.description: The energy fee in sun for the Tron transaction

bandwidthFee.description: The bandwidth fee in sun for the Tron transaction

total.description: The total network fee in sun (energyFee + bandwidthFee)

gasCosts.description: Estimated gas costs for executing the transaction on the origin chain, formatted by chain type

chainId.description: The chain ID where this step will be executed

sellToken.description: The input token address for this step

buyToken.description: The output token address for this step

amount.description: The amount of tokens for this step in token base units

chainId.description: The chain ID where this step will be executed

sellToken.description: The input token address for this step

buyToken.description: The output token address for this step

amount.description: The amount of tokens for this step in token base units

chainId.description: The chain ID where this swap will be executed

sellToken.description: The input token address for this swap

buyToken.description: The output token address for this swap

sellAmount.description: The input amount for this swap in token base units

buyAmount.description: The output amount for this swap in token base units

minBuyAmount.description: The minimum output amount for this swap in token base units

estimatedTimeSeconds.description: Estimated time for this swap step to complete

originChainId.description: The chain ID where tokens will be sent from

destinationChainId.description: The chain ID where tokens will be received

sellToken.description: The token address on the origin chain

buyToken.description: The token address on the destination chain

sellAmount.description: The amount of tokens to bridge from the origin chain in token base units

buyAmount.description: The amount of tokens to be received on the destination chain in token base units

minBuyAmount.description: The minimum amount of tokens guaranteed on the destination chain in token base units

provider.description: The bridge provider name handling this cross-chain transfer

estimatedTimeSeconds.description: Estimated time for this bridge step to complete

steps.description: Sequential steps required to complete the cross-chain swap, including wrapping, swaps, and bridge operations

chainType.description: The blockchain type for Ethereum-compatible chains

to.description: The contract address to send the transaction to on the EVM chain

data.description: The calldata containing execution details for the EVM transaction

gas.description: The estimated gas limit required for successful transaction execution

gasPrice.description: The gas price in wei for the EVM transaction

value.description: The amount of native currency in wei to send with the transaction

chainType.description: The blockchain type for Solana Virtual Machine
The blockchain type for Tron Virtual Machine

to.description: The Tron contract address to interact with

data.description: The calldata for the Tron smart contract call

value.description: The amount of TRX in sun to send with the transaction

ownerAddress.description: The Tron address of the transaction sender

memo.description: Optional memo attached to the Tron transaction

transaction.description: The transaction details to execute on the origin chain to initiate the cross-chain swap

estimatedTimeSeconds.description: Estimated total time in seconds for the cross-chain swap to complete, including bridge confirmation time

spender.description: The address to set the allowance on

allowance.description: The allowances that the `originAddress` must set in order to execute the swap successfully. Null if no allowance is required

actual.description: The current balance of `sellToken` in the `originAddress` address

expected.description: The balance of `sellToken` required for the swap to execute successfully

balance.description: The balance of `sellToken` that the `originAddress` must hold. Null if the `originAddress` has sufficient balance

simulationIncomplete.description: This is set to `true` when 0x cannot validate the transaction. This happens when the `originAddress` has an insufficient balance of `sellToken` and 0x is unable to perform enhanced quote validation with such low balance. Note that this does not necessarily mean that the trade will revert

quoteId.description: The unique ID for this cross-chain quote

quotes.description: Array of available cross-chain quotes, each representing a different combination of bridges and DEXs

liquidityAvailable.description: Whether sufficient liquidity exists across bridges and DEXs to execute the cross-chain swap

zid.description: The unique ZeroEx identifier of the request

get.description: Get the status of a cross chain transaction

parameters.description: Visit dashboard.0x.org to get your API Key
parameters.name: 0x-api-key
originChain
parameters.description: The origin chain where the cross-chain transaction was initiated

parameters.name: originTxHash
parameters.description: The transaction hash on the origin chain to track. Format varies by chain type (32-byte hex for EVM/HyperCore, base58 signature for Solana, 64-char hex for Tron)

parameters.name: quoteId
parameters.description: The quote ID associated with the cross-chain transaction

status.description: The current status of the cross-chain transaction

bridge.description: The bridge provider handling the cross-chain transfer

chainId.description: The chain ID where this step will be executed

sellToken.description: The input token address for this step

buyToken.description: The output token address for this step

amount.description: The amount of tokens for this step in token base units

chainId.description: The chain ID where this transaction occurred

chain.description: The name of the chain where this transaction occurred

txHash.description: The transaction hash on this specific chain

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when this transaction was confirmed on-chain

transactions.description: The transactions involved in this step

chainId.description: The chain ID where this step will be executed

sellToken.description: The input token address for this step

buyToken.description: The output token address for this step

amount.description: The amount of tokens for this step in token base units

chainId.description: The chain ID where this transaction occurred

chain.description: The name of the chain where this transaction occurred

txHash.description: The transaction hash on this specific chain

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when this transaction was confirmed on-chain

transactions.description: The transactions involved in this step

chainId.description: The chain ID where this swap will be executed

sellToken.description: The input token address for this swap

buyToken.description: The output token address for this swap

sellAmount.description: The input amount for this swap in token base units

minBuyAmount.description: The minimum output amount for this swap in token base units

quotedBuyAmount.description: The quoted output amount for this swap in token base units

estimatedTimeSeconds.description: Estimated time for this swap step to complete

chainId.description: The chain ID where this transaction occurred

chain.description: The name of the chain where this transaction occurred

txHash.description: The transaction hash on this specific chain

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when this transaction was confirmed on-chain

transactions.description: The transactions involved in this step

sellToken.description: The input token address for this bridge

buyToken.description: The output token address for this bridge

sellAmount.description: The input amount for this bridge in token base units

minBuyAmount.description: The minimum output amount for this bridge in token base units

quotedBuyAmount.description: The quoted output amount for this bridge in token base units

settledBuyAmount.description: The settled output amount for this bridge in token base units

estimatedTimeSeconds.description: Estimated time for this bridge step to complete

chainId.description: The chain ID where this transaction occurred

chain.description: The name of the chain where this transaction occurred

txHash.description: The transaction hash on this specific chain

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when this transaction was confirmed on-chain

transactions.description: The transactions involved in this step

steps.description: The steps involved in the cross-chain transaction

chainId.description: The chain ID where this transaction occurred

chain.description: The name of the chain where this transaction occurred

txHash.description: The transaction hash on this specific chain

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when this transaction was confirmed on-chain

transactions.description: The transactions involved in the failure

chainId.description: The chain ID where this recovery step will be executed

token.description: The token address of the funds to be recovered

amount.description: The amount of tokens to be recovered in token base units

estimatedTimeSeconds.description: Estimated time for this recovery step to finish, measured from when the recovery process begins

deadline.description: The deadline timestamp of which the funds are available for recovery, if applicable. Not initiating the recovery process within this deadline may result in funds being forever lost

chainType.description: The blockchain type for Ethereum-compatible chains

to.description: The contract address to send the transaction to on the EVM chain

data.description: The calldata containing execution details for the EVM transaction

gas.description: The estimated gas limit required for successful transaction execution

gasPrice.description: The gas price in wei for the EVM transaction

value.description: The amount of native currency in wei to send with the transaction

chainType.description: The blockchain type for Solana Virtual Machine
The blockchain type for Tron Virtual Machine

to.description: The Tron contract address to interact with

data.description: The calldata for the Tron smart contract call

value.description: The amount of TRX in sun to send with the transaction

ownerAddress.description: The Tron address of the transaction sender

memo.description: Optional memo attached to the Tron transaction

manualTransaction.description: The manual transaction for submission, if applicable. This transaction may be submitted by anyone to initiate the recovery process

settledAmount.description: The actual settled refund amount in token base units

recovery.description: The recovery step for the failure

failure.description: The failure context for the cross-chain transaction

chainId.description: The chain ID where this transaction occurred

chain.description: The name of the chain where this transaction occurred

txHash.description: The transaction hash on this specific chain

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when this transaction was confirmed on-chain

transactions.description: List of all blockchain transactions involved in this cross-chain swap, across multiple chains

zid.description: The unique ZeroEx identifier of the request

get.description: List available swap and bridge sources for a cross chain swap

parameters.description: Visit dashboard.0x.org to get your API Key
parameters.name: 0x-api-key

name.description: The name of the bridge provider

originChainId.description: The numeric chain ID of the origin chain

destinationChainId.description: The numeric chain ID of the destination chain

chainPairs.description: Origin-destination chain pairs supported by the bridge provider

bridges.description: The array of bridge providers and their supported chain pairs

name.description: The name of the liquidity sources aggregated by 0x

chainIds.description: The numeric chain IDs of the chains supported by the liquidity source

swapSources.description: The array of liquidity sources and their supported chains

zid.description: The unique ZeroEx identifier of the request

get.description: Get cross-chain transaction history for a user wallet address. Note: this endpoint is in beta and still a work in progress — please reach out to the 0x team if you or your users run into any issues.

parameters.description: Visit dashboard.0x.org to get your API Key
parameters.name: 0x-api-key
user
parameters.description: The wallet address of the user to get transaction history for. Accepts EVM (0x...), Solana, and Tron addresses

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to return

originTx.description: The transaction hash on the origin chain

destinationTx.description: The transaction hash on the destination chain

status.description: The current status of the transaction

limit.description: The limit used for this query

nextCursor.description: Cursor for next page. Null if no more results

hasMore.description: Whether there are more transactions available

zid.description: The unique ZeroEx identifier of the request

get.description: Stream cross-chain quotes as they become available

parameters.description: Visit dashboard.0x.org to get your API Key
parameters.name: 0x-api-key
originChain
parameters.description: The source chain from which the cross-chain swap will originate. Can be specified as chain ID or name. See [here](https://0x-docs.gitbook.io/0x-cross-chain-api-beta/developer-resources/supported-chains-and-providers) for the list of supported chains

parameters.name: destinationChain
parameters.description: The destination chain where tokens will be received after the cross-chain swap. Can be specified as chain ID or name. See [here](https://0x-docs.gitbook.io/0x-cross-chain-api-beta/developer-resources/supported-chains-and-providers) for the list of supported chains

parameters.name: sellToken
parameters.description: The contract address of the token to sell on the origin chain. Format varies by chain type (EVM address for EVM/HyperCore chains, token mint address for Solana, base58check address for Tron)

parameters.name: buyToken
parameters.description: The contract address of the token to buy on the destination chain. Format varies by chain type (EVM address for EVM/HyperCore chains, token mint address for Solana, base58check address for Tron)

parameters.name: sellAmount
parameters.description: The amount of `sellToken` (in `sellToken`'s base units) to sell on the origin chain

parameters.name: originAddress
parameters.description: The wallet address on the origin chain that holds the sellToken balance and will initiate the cross-chain transaction

parameters.name: destinationAddress
parameters.description: The wallet address on the destination chain that will receive the buyToken. If not specified, defaults to originAddress on the destination chain

parameters.name: gasPayer
parameters.description: The Solana address that will pay for transaction fees when the origin chain is Solana. Only applicable for Solana origin chains

parameters.name: slippageBps
parameters.description: The maximum acceptable slippage for each swap or bridge step of the cross-chain swap in basis points (100 = 1%)

parameters.name: excludedBridges
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of bridge providers to exclude from routing

parameters.name: includedBridges
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of bridge providers to include in routing. Mutually exclusive with excludedBridges

parameters.name: excludedSwapSources
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of DEX sources to exclude from routing on both chains

parameters.name: feeBps
parameters.description: The trading fee amounts in basis points to charge on the origin chain (supports single or comma-separated values). Must be used together with feeRecipient. When multiple values are provided, must match the length of feeRecipient. Note: integrator fee collection is not yet supported for Tron-originated routes.

parameters.name: feeRecipient
parameters.description: The wallet addresses to receive trading fees on the origin chain (supports single or comma-separated values). Must be used together with feeBps. When multiple values are provided, must match the length of feeBps. Note: integrator fee collection is not yet supported for Tron-originated routes.

parameters.name: feeToken
parameters.description: The token addresses for fee collection on the origin chain (supports single or comma-separated values). Must be the same as sellToken. When multiple values are provided, must match the length of feeBps. If omitted, defaults to sellToken. Note: integrator fee collection is not yet supported for Tron-originated routes.

parameters.name: maxNumQuotes
parameters.description: The maximum number of cross-chain quotes to return, between 1 and 10. Each quote represents a different combination of bridges and DEXs

minBuyAmount.description: The minimum amount of buyToken guaranteed across the entire cross-chain quote. This price is influenced by the `slippageBps` parameter
